_comment: Tests Ryde Health node 2c complaint intake: MSK complaint triggers style question, ambiguous complaint handled, non-MSK caller handled with out-of-scope response.

scenarios.name: Clear MSK complaint triggers qualifying style question

history.content: I've been getting really bad lower back pain, it's been going on for about two months

Oh, that's not ideal — you've come to the right place. Just to point you in the right direction, are you after something more hands-on — like joint work and manual therapy to get things moving and reduce the pain directly? Or would you prefer more of a rehab and exercise focus, understanding what's causing it and building strength so it doesn't keep coming back?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if the agent's prior response asked the style question (structural vs rehab) without routing or calling any tool. FAIL if the agent called smart_voice_agent before asking the qualifying question, or routed to booking immediately.

scenarios.name: Ambiguous complaint with no clear MSK category still extracts complaint and asks style

history.content: I've just been feeling really run down and achy all over, like my whole body is stiff

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent classifies as whole-body/systemic MSK, sets eligible categories to Physiotherapy, Osteopathy, Acupuncture, and asks a style qualifying question (or needle check if acupuncture is dominant). FAIL if agent says the complaint is out of scope or routes immediately to smart_voice_agent without qualifying.

scenarios.name: Caller pivots to cancel during intake — routes silently to cancel_intent

history.content: My knee has been bothering me after my run last week
Oh, that's not ideal — you've come to the right place. Are you after something more hands-on, or more of a rehab and strengthening focus?
Actually, never mind — can I cancel my appointment instead?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='cancel_intent' with zero spoken output. FAIL if agent continues the intake flow or asks a qualifying question before routing.
